senses.def_en: careful to buy only what is necessary
senses.example: As children we were taught to be frugal and hard-working.
senses.example_zh: 小时候大人教我们要勤俭。

senses.def_en: wise and careful use of money, so that none is wasted
senses.example: To practice thrift is a virtue.

derivatives: thrifty a. 节俭的,俭约的

senses.def_en: to be in charge of sth. (~at, over)
senses.example: Whoever presides at the meeting will need patience and tact.
senses.example_zh: 无论谁主持会议，都既要有耐性，又要机敏老练。

entries.mnemonic: intro(向内)+duct(引导)+ion→引导入内→介绍

senses.example: He was shaking her hand before I could finish the introduction.
senses.example_zh: 未等我介绍完，他就握住她的手了。

derivatives: 【用法】表示"对…的介绍,…的引言"用~ to,表示"(某事物)的引进"用~ of。
introductory a. 引导的,介绍的

senses.def_en: to have control of or power over
senses.example: The team has dominated international football for years. // a society in which males dominate
senses.example_zh: 该球队雄霸国际足坛多年。一个由男性支配一切的社会
大教堂高高矗立，俯瞰整个城市。

senses.example: P&G is in a dominant position in the market of their daily chemical products.
senses.example_zh: 宝洁公司在日用化工产品市场上处优势地位。

senses.example: The castle was built in a dominant position on a hill.
senses.example_zh: 城堡建在山上一处居高临下的地方。

entries.mnemonic: wel(看作well)+fare(费用)→用钱做好事→福利

senses.def_en: financial or other aid provided, esp. by the government, to people in need
senses.example: Most of the families in this neighborhood are on welfare.
senses.example_zh: 这一带的大多数家庭都领政府的福利救济。

senses.def_en: to be formed from two or more things or people (~of)
senses.example: The American Congress consists of the House of Representatives and Senate.
senses.example_zh: 美国国会由众议院与参议院构成。

senses.example: Happiness does not consist in how many possessions you own.
senses.example_zh: 是否快乐不在于你拥有多少财产。

derivatives: 【用法】由…构成：consist of(主动语态)/ be composed of(被动语态)。

senses.def_en: to establish or create an organization, a government, etc.
senses.example: Governments should be constituted by the will of the people.
senses.example_zh: 政府应当按照人民的意志建立。

derivatives: 【用法】constitute 表示"部分构成整体",用于主动结构,不用于进行时态。

senses.example: The United Kingdom comprises England, Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland. // Fifty states comprise the United States.
senses.example_zh: 英国由英格兰、威尔士、苏格兰和北爱尔兰构成。50个州组成美国。
